description: Policy overlay on top of the openmp source profile: upgrades most recommended-profile warnings to errors and adds stricter tag/tag-mismatch enforcement. Intended for new projects, not as a drop-in migration target for legacy codebases (principle 3.7: migration must be incremental, previewable, and reversible, not forced by switching profiles).

references.note: General basis for what counts as 'modern' omp-stdlib practice; specific rule content is owned by pawnlint, not this profile.
